description: Zero-knowledge encrypted storage for humans and AI agents. Client-side AES-256-GCM, EU-hosted.
name: io.github.bitatlas-group/bitatlas

environmentVariables.description: Your BitAtlas API key (starts with ba_). Generate one at https://bitatlas.com/vault/settings
environmentVariables.name: BITATLAS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your hex-encoded 256-bit master key (64 hex chars). Required for file upload and download. Derived from your password client-side — never sent to BitAtlas servers.
environmentVariables.name: BITATLAS_MASTER_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Web origin used to build share links (default: https://www.bitatlas.com)
environmentVariables.name: BITATLAS_WEB_URL
